chest.name: Quantum Chest
chest.description: Part of an entangled pair. Shares its inventory with its linked chest, regardless of the distance between them. If either linked chest is lost, the other collapses out of existence along with everything inside it.
bigchest.name: Big Quantum Chest
bigchest.description: A larger version with increased storage capacity. Part of an entangled pair, it shares its inventory with its linked chest regardless of the distance between them. If either linked chest is lost, the other collapses out of existence along with everything inside it.
collapse.message: A Quantum Chest lost its entangled counterpart and collapsed out of existence, along with everything inside it.
